name: Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. is a late clinical-stage therapeutics company focused on developing and potentially commercializing new medicines for patients with social anxiety disorder, depression, menopausal hot flashes, psychomotor impairment due to mental fatigue, and cancer cachexia. Its most advanced product candidate is fasedienol, being investigated in a U.S. Phase 3 program for the acute treatment of social anxiety disorder.
sellsTo: Women with moderate to severe vasomotor symptoms due to menopause
Individuals with psychomotor impairment due to mental fatigue

exposures.sentence: We are a late clinical-stage therapeutics company focused on developing and potentially commercializing new medicines for patients with social anxiety disorder, depression, menopausal hot flashes, psychomotor impairment due to mental fatigue, and cancer cachexia.

catalysts.event: Topline results from randomized portion of PALISADE-4 Phase 3 trial for fasedienol
catalysts.sentence: Topline results from the randomized portion of PALISADE-4 are expected in the second quarter of calendar 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline results from randomized portion of Repeat Dose Study for fasedienol
catalysts.sentence: we expect topline results from the randomized portion of the Repeat Dose Study in the third quarter of calendar 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Social anxiety disorder affects over 30 million adults in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Social anxiety disorder (SAD) is a highly prevalent, serious, and sometimes life-threatening psychiatric mental health disorder affecting over 30 million adults in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Vasomotor symptoms due to menopause affect 60% to 80% of menopausal women in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Vasomotor symptoms (VMS), comprised of hot flashes and night sweats are the most common symptoms of the menopausal transition, affecting 60% - 80% of menopausal women in the U.S. according to SWAN (Study of Women Across the Nation) and other published studies.

tamClaims.claim: Major depressive disorder affects approximately 21 million adults in the U.S. (8.4% of all adults).
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. National Institute of Mental Health (NIMH) reports that approximately 21 million adults in the U.S., or approximately 8.4% of all adults in the U.S., experienced at least one major depressive episode in 2020.

tamClaims.claim: Depression affects over 300 million people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the World Health Organization (WHO), depression affects over 300 million people worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: Premenstrual dysphoric disorder affects 5% to 8% of menstruating women.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the U.S. National Institutes of Health (NIH), 5% to 8% of menarcheal (menstruating women) individuals have moderate-to-severe symptoms that can cause significant distress and functional impairment, suggestive of premenstrual dysphoric disorder (PMDD), a severe, sometimes disabling extension of premenstrual syndrome (PMS).

tamClaims.claim: Cancer cachexia occurs in up to 80% of people with advanced cancer.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the National Cancer Institute (NCI), cachexia is estimated to occur in up to 80% of people with advanced cancer, depending on the type of cancer and how well they respond to cancer treatment.
